events.title: Meta Platforms reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Meta Platforms reached its best available historical closing price of USD 790.00.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Meta Platforms added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Meta Platforms is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Platform companies are often judged by whether user engagement, regulation and monetisation remain supportive over time.
